ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "baseline_id" TEXT /* Baseline identifier for the patient's data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient at the time of enrollment */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient (M/F) */,
  "current_smoker" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient is currently a smoker */,
  "previous_smoker" TEXT /* Indicates if the patient has smoked previously */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "concomitant_medications" TEXT /* Concomitant medications taken by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_baseline_id FOREIGN KEY ("baseline_id") REFERENCES baseline_data ("baseline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "baseline_data" (
  "baseline_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each baseline measurement */,
  "ccp" REAL /* CCP level of the patient at baseline */,
  "crp" REAL /* CRP level of the patient at baseline */,
  "vaspain" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale pain score at baseline */,
  "vasglobalpt" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale global patient health score */,
  "vasphysician" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale physician assessment score */,
  "vastiredness" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale tiredness score */,
  "swollen" INTEGER /* Number of swollen joints at baseline */,
  "tender" INTEGER /* Number of tender joints at baseline */,
  "disease_activity_score" REAL /* Disease activity score at baseline */,
  "patient_global_assessment" REAL /* Patient global assessment at baseline */,
  "physician_global_assessment" REAL /* Physician global assessment at baseline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("baseline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_data" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assessed */,
  "timepoint" INTEGER /* Time point of the visit (e.g., 0, 1, 2 for follow-ups) */,
  "ccp" REAL /* CCP level at the time of the visit */,
  "crp" REAL /* CRP level at the time of the visit */,
  "vaspain" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale pain score at the visit */,
  "vasglobalpt" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale global patient health score at the visit */,
  "vasphysician" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale physician assessment score at the visit */,
  "vastiredness" REAL /* Visual Analog Scale tiredness score at the visit */,
  "disease_activity_score" REAL /* Disease activity score at the visit */,
  "patient_global_assessment" REAL /* Patient global assessment at the visit */,
  "physician_global_assessment" REAL /* Physician global assessment at the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the lab result */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory test performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Value of the test result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "normal_range" TEXT /* Normal range for the test result */,
  "abnormal_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the result is abnormal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient reporting the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event experienced */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the adverse event was reported */,
  "seriousness" TEXT /* Seriousness of the adverse event (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "expectedness" TEXT /* Expectedness of the adverse event (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "relatedness" TEXT /* Relatedness of the adverse event to the trial (e.g., yes/no) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the adverse event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, coordinator, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., patient data, trial information) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose status is recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current participation status (e.g., enrolled, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "reason_for_status" TEXT /* Reason for the patient's current status (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participation_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the study design (e.g., RCT, Observational) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study design */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of study design (e.g., interventional, non-interventional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study design used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the trial */,
  "investigator" TEXT /* Investigator leading the trial */,
  "intervention" TEXT /* Intervention or treatment being studied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_trials_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES study_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_locations" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the site coordinator */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "site_trials" (
  "site_trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-trial association */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site participating in the trial */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being conducted at the site */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the site's participation in the trial */,
  "enrollment_target" INTEGER /* Target number of patients for enrollment at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_trials_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_site_trials_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES site_locations ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease condition (e.g., Rheumatoid Arthritis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_conditions" (
  "patient_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-condition association */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient with the condition */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES disease_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-condition association */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the condition */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the trial related to the condition */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the trial related to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES disease_conditions ("condition_id")
)
